name: Sanjeev - Multi-Stage AI Job Tailor Pipeline

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const prompt = `You are a job analysis, CV tailoring, and ATS optimisation expert.

Candidate: Sanjeev Kumar — MSc Embedded Systems Engineering, University of Leeds (Sep 2026)
Skills: C, C++, Python, Verilog HDL, MATLAB/Simulink | ARM Cortex-M (STM32), Cyclone V SoC, Pixhawk PX4/NuttX
Protocols: CAN 2.0B, UART, SPI, I2C, AXI4-Lite, MAVLink, PWM
Experience: 8-month embedded firmware placement at InTrainz, UAV avionics engineer (Pixhawk, reduced telemetry latency 40%), Formula Student EV (CAN telemetry)
Projects: AI thermal prediction for EV inverter (IGBT, STM32 X-CUBE-AI, MATLAB), CAN sensor fusion (STM32+FPGA, custom Verilog IP)
Certs: UK Amateur Radio Licence M7KVD, Power Electronics, EV Sensors, MATLAB Onramp

Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no code fences):
{
  "title": "job title",
  "company": "company name",
  "location": "location",
  "key_requirements": ["list"],
  "fit_score": 1-5,
  "matching_skills": ["list"],
  "gaps": ["list"],
  "ats_keywords": ["every ATS keyword from posting"],
  "ats_keywords_in_cv": ["keywords candidate has"],
  "ats_keywords_missing": ["missing — flag addable vs genuine gaps"],
  "ats_score": "0-100",
  "ats_optimised_skills_line": "comma-separated ATS skills line",
  "tailored_profile": "2-3 sentence profile",
  "tailored_bullets": ["6 rewritten bullets"],
  "cover_letter": "350 words max, natural, company-specific, visa: graduating Sep 2026, Graduate Route Visa = 2yr unrestricted work",
  "ats_tips": ["3-5 tips"]
}

Job posting:
${d.job_text}`;

const geminiBody = {
  contents: [{ parts: [{ text: prompt }] }],
  generationConfig: { temperature: 0.3, maxOutputTokens: 8192 }
};

return [{ json: { ...d, gemini_body: JSON.stringify(geminiBody) } }];
